=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
5/23/92	Goldwyn Events Center, Bally's Casino, Las Vegas, NV

MJS master. The only difference is that Tangled Up In Blue and I'll Be Your Baby Tonight are divided as single tracks

Disc 1
01 Rainy Day Women #12 & 35
02 Joey
03 Union Sundown
04 Just Like A Woman
05 Drifter's Escape
06 Tangled Up In Blue
07 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
08 Love Minus Zero/No Limit (acoustic with band)
09 Little Moses (acoustic with band)
10 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic with band)
11 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic with band), 

Disc 2
01 Cat's In The Well
02 Idiot Wind
03 The Times They Are A-Changing
04 Highway 61 Revisited
05 Absolutely Sweet Marie
06 All Along The Watchtower
07 Blowin' In The Wind (solo acoustic) 
===================
